overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit waterfront district. The player crosses a street beneath an elevated highway, then descends to a lower promenade lined with palm trees and outdoor cafes glowing with purple and cyan neon lights.

events.description: white sports car drives past from left to right through the intersection
black vehicle approaches and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet yellow-striped crosswalk beneath the overpass, heading toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection with headlights on
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: large elevated highway structure with metal beams spanning the intersection
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt
tall vertical digital advertisement screen with red and white graphics
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a foggy nighttime urban intersection beneath a massive elevated highway. The player character walks across yellow-striped crosswalk lines on rain-slicked asphalt while a white sports car passes through the intersection. Palm trees and digital billboards are visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront sidewalk with white railing

events.description: turns right onto the waterfront sidewalk away from the street intersection
begins descending the ramp leading down to the lower promenade level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper waterfront sidewalk, passing white railing and approaching the descent ramp

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the railing away from the camera

entered.detail: low white concrete barrier separating the sidewalk from the water
sloped walkway with green ambient lighting leading down to lower level

segments.scene_description: Turning onto the waterfront sidewalk, the camera moves past a white railing with palm trees now visible to the left. The path leads to a descending ramp illuminated by green lights, transitioning from the upper street level down toward the lower promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with outdoor dining

events.description: enters the lower promenade area with neon-lit outdoor cafe seating
passes by outdoor cafe tables with vibrant purple neon underlighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the lower promenade past outdoor cafes where patrons sit at tables under neon lights

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at outdoor cafe table under purple neon lights

entered.detail: rows of tables and chairs under awnings with purple and cyan neon lighting
long continuous awning with bright purple neon strip lighting underneath
series of illuminated vertical screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Now on the lower promenade, the walkway runs alongside outdoor cafes sheltered by awnings with intense purple neon lighting. Patrons sit at tables on the wet tiled pavement while digital advertisement panels line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area of Nicola soda cafe

events.description: approaches the Nicola cafe with distinctive yellow and purple checkered floor

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade, passing closely by the Nicola cafe outdoor seating area

notable_agents.action: person sitting at table inside the Nicola cafe glass enclosure

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for Nicola soda brand with distinctive typography
yellow and purple checkerboard tiled floor inside the cafe seating area
transparent glass barrier separating the walkway from the lower cafe level

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the Nicola cafe, identifiable by its prominent signage and distinctive yellow-purple checkered floor visible through glass railings. The camera moves past patrons seated at tables under bright neon lights, continuing along the misty waterfront promenade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy urban intersection beneath a massive highway down to a vibrant, neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins by crossing rain-slicked asphalt marked with yellow stripes as a white sports car passes through the haze, with distant billboards and palm trees flickering in the mist. As the camera turns onto the sidewalk, it moves past a white railing and follows a descending ramp illuminated by green lights, transitioning from the upper street level to the lower district. The scene then opens onto a wet tiled walkway lined with outdoor cafes sheltered by intense purple neon awnings and digital advertisement panels. Finally, the camera glides past the Nicola cafe, passing patrons seated on a distinctive yellow-purple checkered floor before continuing along the misty waterfront.
